insight_text: 22.0% of customers are at churn risk. This segment is described as Dormant premium assets with Historical AOV > ¥3000. Recommended action: Build win-back campaigns with logistics follow-up and electronics upgrade reminders.

Male customers around age 45 peak in both customer volume and AOV. Business meaning: This group is the core profit driver of the platform. Recommended action: Launch premium electronics campaigns with expert reviews and VIP services.

Rural high-value customers show strong preference and high AOV in the Books category. Business meaning: Rural market contains underexplored knowledge consumption demand. Recommended action: Create curated book bundles and knowledge-oriented content campaigns.

27.0% of customers are potential customers. They are the Growth engine but currently show Large base but low repurchase frequency. Recommended action: use repurchase incentives, category bundles, and personalized recommendations to increase repeat purchases.

27.7% of customers are high-value customers. They are the Core profit engine with preference for Apparel and Home. Recommended action: build VIP retention, loyalty benefits, and premium product recommendations.
Top 10% customers contribute more than 40% of GMV. Business meaning: Revenue is highly concentrated among premium customers. Recommended action: Prioritize retention resources for top-tier customers.
